title: A Session With Uncle Sidney - IV - And Makes Nursery Rhymes - 1 The Diners In The Kitchen
content:
Our dog Fred
     Et the bread.

    

     Our dog Dash
     Et the hash.

    

     Our dog Pete
     Et the meat.

    

     Our dog Davy
     Et the gravy.

    

     Our dog Toffy
     Et the coffee.

    

     Our dog Jake
     Et the cake.

    

     Our dog Trip
     Et the dip.

     And - the worst,
     From the first, - 

    

     Our dog Fido
     Et the pie-dough.
meaning:
James Whitcomb Riley's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Session With Uncle Sidney - IV - And Makes Nursery Rhymes - 1 The Diners In The Kitchen"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
